title: Easier Minecraft
description: Is Minecraft too hard for you? Do you get angry over mobs trying to ruin your mining trips? This mod adds new weapons, potions and armor to make sure that mobs will never bother you again on your trips.
body:
**Information: If you are wondering why this mod has been last updated 2 years ago that is because I have a lot going on in my life rightnow with family matters and school related stuff. However I have a new update that will come out soon. (I cant provide exact information at this time because I am still busy with school stuff and family related matters and I dont know when exactly I can release the update.**

Is Minecraft too hard for you? Do you get angry over mobs killing you over and over again and destroying everything you have? Then this mod is something for you. This mod adds some minecraft items that will make it impossible for you to d!e in minecraft. Including armor that doesnt break, potions that only give you good effects,and some OP tools including a sword, a pickaxe, a shovel,an axe, the ability to fly in survival and a secret pet (all these items are accessible in the creative menu under the mods creative tab entry)
**Note if you cant find the potion in the creative tab go to the search menu and search for OPpotion**.
**Disclaimer: This mod is only intended for minecraft singleplayer. It is not intended to be a hacking tool. Remember to disable the mod when you play  on large multiplayer servers like hypixel.** This mod is for the people that just started minecraft or just want to feel like a god to other mobs.
(formerly known as features and items Minecraft shouldn't have, before I decided to release it to the public)

EDIT: Thanks for 50 total downloads, I honestly never expected this to be downloaded so much as I originally only made this as a fun project and one day decided to release it to the public to see if people even want this kind of mod.

EDIT 2: Thanks for almost 200 total downloads, this really means a lot to me and I honestly thought it would stay at 50 downloads since I thought to myself: "who needs such a mod?"but judging from the numbers people really seem to like this mod. 

PS: Incase you are asking, I am not able to port this mod to Fabric since I currently dont know a lot about Fabric and I am lacking the expertise but once I know how it all works, all of you Fabric players can enjoy this mod aswell :)
